interpreter_page.title: Real-time Interpreter
interpreter_page.subtitle: Customer language is set to app language; shop language is fixed to Korean.
interpreter_page.onboarding: When the customer inputs, it translates to Korean; when the staff inputs Korean, it translates to your language.
interpreter_page.customer_recording: Recording visitor... click again to finish
interpreter_page.staff_recording: Recording staff... click again to finish
interpreter_page.staff_placeholder: Type what the staff said in Korean.
interpreter_page.voice_supported_hint: Record via mic or type text below.
interpreter_page.voice_not_supported_hint: Voice input not supported. Use text.

hero.title:
Capture the beauty of Korea,
in your schedule
hero.subtitle: Select your beauty service first and move directly to the booking step. We have designed it for fast mobile selection followed by shop comparison and reservation requests.
hero.welcome: Welcome {{name}}, please select a service today.

hair.label: Hair
hair.summary: Start booking everything from style changes to quick trims fastest here.

nail.label: Nail
nail.summary: Pick your desired mood and design, then move lightly to the booking step.

esthetic.label: Esthetic
esthetic.summary: Compare shops and book based on your skin condition and treatment goals.

waxing.label: Waxing
waxing.summary: Quickly find shops matching your area and schedule, leading into the booking flow.

makeup.label: Makeup
makeup.summary: Select a makeup service for your event date and start booking immediately.

lash.label: Lash
lash.summary: Connect directly to the menu for everything from natural extensions to volume styling.

selection.empty: Please select a category first. The start booking button will activate after selection.

cta.hint: Explore available beauty services in the next screen based on the selected category.

interpreter.title: Use the Translation Helper if you need foreign language booking support
interpreter.description: Jump directly to real-time interpretation if you're worried about consultations before booking or conversations during your visit.

items.title: Category Selection at a Glance
items.desc: Pick your desired service on the first screen and enter the booking flow immediately.

items.title: Worry-free Language Support
items.desc: Communicate naturally with the shop using the real-time translation helper whenever needed.

items.title: Mobile-First Booking Path
items.desc: Increased conversion with card-type buttons easy to select with one hand and large CTAs.

interpreter_entry.title: Live Translation
interpreter_entry.description: Communicate easily with staff at any shop

beauty_bookings.hero_title: Check everything from booking requests to delivery memos at once.
beauty_bookings.hero_text: Recent bookings appear first, and you can quickly separate ongoing and completed reservations.
beauty_bookings.login_title: Sign in to check your booking history.
beauty_bookings.login_text: Sign in to see all your requested beauty bookings and staff delivery memos at a glance.
beauty_bookings.status_desc_failed: Confirmation is needed for this request.
beauty_bookings.status_desc_change_requested: A change of schedule or service is being requested.
beauty_bookings.status_guide_confirmed: The booking is confirmed. Please double-check your date and time before visiting.
beauty_bookings.empty: No beauty bookings to check yet. They will appear here once completed.
beauty_bookings.select_prompt: Select a booking to see details.
beauty_bookings.change_request_hint: An operator is reviewing your request. Please wait.
beauty_bookings.alt_offer_desc: Your requested time was full. The shop suggested the schedule below. Please confirm.
beauty_bookings.alt_response_accepted: Schedule changed by accepting the offer.
beauty_bookings.alt_slot_select_error: Please select one of the suggested slots.
beauty_bookings.manage_desc: You can cancel while requested or confirmed. Cannot be undone after cancellation.
beauty_bookings.cancel_details_placeholder: Enter additional cancellation reasons if any.
beauty_bookings.change_placeholder: e.g., Change to March 20, 2PM / Want to change service menu
beauty_bookings.error_cancel_403: Only your own bookings can be cancelled.
beauty_bookings.error_change_reason: Enter what you want to change.

notifications.title: Notification Settings
notifications.hero_desc: Choose how you want to receive updates for Kello's premium concierge services.

channel.title: Channels
channel.email_desc: We'll safely send core updates about your booking information and progress via email.
channel.app_desc: Important booking status changes are always recorded in the app notification box, so you can check them anytime.

types.title: Update Types
types.booking_desc: Receive notifications at key stages of service such as request, confirmation, and completion.
types.change_desc: We will immediately notify you of the approval or rejection of your requested date/item changes.
types.alternative_desc: We will notify you when a salon suggests an alternative time due to your preferred time being fully booked.

notifications.footer_note: Essential booking-related notices may be sent regardless of your settings.

beauty_explore.hero_desc: Select a category for more accurate exploration. You can now check all beauty shops.
beauty_explore.form_request_placeholder: Mention desired style or any special requests
beauty_explore.agreement_confirm: I have checked the selected booking information.
beauty_explore.agreement_confirm_desc: I understand times may be adjusted based on shop availability.
beauty_explore.agreement_privacy: I agree to receive guide contacts for booking.
beauty_explore.agreement_privacy_desc: Agree to provide contact info for confirmation and changes.
beauty_explore.toast_addon_limit: Maximum 2 add-on options can be selected.
beauty_explore.toast_submit_error: Failed to save booking. Try again.
beauty_explore.label_select_prompt: Select a booking to see details.
beauty_explore.completion_desc1: We will notify you after the shop checks availability.
beauty_explore.completion_desc2: Please note it's not confirmed until you receive a confirmation notice.
beauty_explore.completion_desc3: Track progress anytime in My Bookings menu.
beauty_explore.completion_flow_hint: Your booking request has been received. It will be confirmed after the shop reviews it. Check results via notification or My Bookings.
beauty_explore.cancel_policy_hint: You may cancel before confirmation. Cancellations after confirmation are subject to the shop's policy.
beauty_explore.price_estimate_hint: Prices shown are estimates. Final amounts may vary based on options or shop policy.
beauty_explore.booking_panel_desc: Pick a time for the shop and continue to confirmation.
beauty_explore.booking_empty_desc: Tap `Select Booking Time` on a shop card above.
beauty_explore.booking_not_found_desc: Pick another shop or reload times.
beauty_explore.booking_no_slots: No times available for this date.
beauty_explore.summary_hint: Pick date and time to continue.
beauty_explore.confirm_desc: Fill in the details for a ready-to-show request card.
beauty_explore.confirm_empty_desc: Tap `Check Booking Info` after picking date/time.
beauty_explore.confirm_price_hint: Amounts shown are estimates. Final price may vary based on options or shop confirmation.
beauty_explore.label_designer_hint: Designer choice is optional. Shop choice is fallback.
